'''Liinade III''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. Its development began near the end of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and continued under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It had light industry which produced [[Comlink/Legends|comlinks]] and [[Caf/Legends|caf]] synthesizers. It fell to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] during the [[Battle of Liinade III]].
